issues.description: Condition missing: effect requires 'HasAttachedDon' with count ≤3 to trigger. Current condition is 'Always', which ignores the 3-or-less DON requirement.
Action type incorrect: 'GiveDon' adds DON to leader. Effect requires 'AttachDon' to attach DON from deck to field. Also missing 'Rest' action applied to attached DON.
